message:
feat(cost_tracker): add per-pane cost aggregation with budget alerts (ft-2dss0)

New cost_tracker module for the caut integration cost dashboard deliverable:
- Per-pane cost/token tracking with BTreeMap for deterministic iteration
- Per-provider cost summaries with agent type grouping
- Budget alerts with Warning/Critical severity classification
- LRU eviction at MAX_TRACKED_PANES (512) capacity
- CostDashboardSnapshot for serializable dashboard state
- CostTelemetry counters following project telemetry pattern
- 24 unit tests + 9 proptest invariant suites (100 cases each)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
